name: Proofpoint
description: Monitor Proofpoint email security platform for threat detection and phishing protection compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Proofpoint TAP at https://threatinsight.proofpoint.com
2. Go to Settings → Connected Applications
3. Create a new Service Principal
4. Base64 encode 'service_principal:secret': echo -n 'principal:secret' | base64
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'service_principal:secret'. Found in Proofpoint TAP dashboard → Settings → Connected Applications. Command: echo -n 'principal:secret' | base64

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Proofpoint email security is active and detecting threats

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Reviews Proofpoint threat detections for incident response readiness
